gold: Ya, ya, yo ya lo recibí.
predicted: Ya, ya está, ya la recibí.
werNormalizedGold: ya ya yo ya lo recibi
werNormalizedPredicted: ya ya esta ya la recibi
sigWerNormalizedGold: ya ya yo ya lo recibi
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: ya ya esta ya la recibi

sigWerErrors.reason: 'yo' (I) and 'esta' (is/this) are completely different words and change the subject of the sentence, which alters the meaning significantly.
'lo' and 'la' are both pronouns, but they refer to different genders in Spanish. In this context, the meaning is only slightly affected, as the object being referred to may be clear from context.
